title: DOE Announces $1.25 Billion Loan to EVgo to Expand Nationwide Public Fast Charging
content: The U.S. Department of Energyâ€™s Loan Programs Office (LPO) announced a $1.25 billion loan guarantee to EVgo Swift Borrower LLC to deploy 7,500 DC fast chargers across 1,100 stations nationwide, with a focus on equitable access and innovation. The project will create over 730 jobs and reduce emissions by 284,000 tons COâ‚‚ annually, equivalent to removing 61,000 gasoline cars. Chargers will feature dynamic power sharing and Autocharge+ systems, prioritizing installation in disadvantaged and low-income communities.This initiative aligns with the Biden-Harris Administration's clean energy and job creation goals.
author: Analysts Account
